description_long: This is a freestanding wooden cabinet with a rectangular shape and a two-tone finish. The top surface is made of a rich, medium-brown wood, while the body and legs are painted a light gray or off-white color. The front features two large wooden doors with vertical handles, providing access to the interior storage space. The cabinet stands on four short, slightly curved legs, giving it a classic yet modern appearance. The back and sides are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements. This piece is suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or communal spaces for storage and organization.
description: A two-tone wooden cabinet with a brown top, light gray body, and two front doors with handles. It stands on four short, curved legs and offers enclosed storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two wooden doors with vertical handles and the brown wood top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, light gray panel and the thickness of the brown wood top.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a flat, undecorated light gray surface with no openings or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side panel and wood top.
